raw_response:
As the owner of Bar Leon, I find Variant B to be significantly more useful. It provides a richer, more actionable analysis that goes beyond a simple price comparison and delves into the strategic levers my competitors are pulling. While Variant A correctly identifies the core psychological friction of my share-plate model, Variant B provides a detailed playbook of how my neighbors are actively managing price perception through bundling, promotions, and digital marketing—tactics I am currently ignoring. The granular price comparison table is an invaluable reference, and the specific, quantified data on competitor deals (e.g., Woosabi's lunch menu, Magari's Restaurant Week) and my own zero-percent review response rate are direct, immediate calls to action. Variant A diagnoses the problem well, but Variant B provides a much clearer path toward a solution by showing me exactly what the market leaders are doing to win on value.

```json
{"winner": "B", "supporting_urls": ["https://chlebiwino.eu/", "https://woosabi.pl/"]}
```
